name: Merchant JS API Overview
body: [{"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Note: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "This guide describes our Merchant Javascript Library API, which allows you to create a custom integration with mostly any Javascript framework, to control the feedback and handle requests from our server."}]}], "appearance": "neutral"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Accessing the Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify) Instance"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JavaScript"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "(window.findifyCallbacks = window.findifyCallbacks || []).push(function(findify) {  console.log(findify) // <- The Findify instance})", "code": true}]}], "lang": "javascript"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "findifyCallbacks", "italic": true}, {"text": " array, including callbacks, will be resolved right after the library is loaded and the initial widgets are rendered. The functions pushed to this array after their initialization will be resolved immediately."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Configuration"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "findify.config", "code": true}, {"text": " - our configuration is made of an immutable structure containing a global setup of your store's settings. Widgets are picking specific parts based on its type or \"slot\" (e.g.: recommendations). In case you want to create a manual recommendation widget, the configuration would not be picked automatically, so you need to apply it manually.\nYou can find an example configuration over here: "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://github.com/findify/findify-js/blob/develop/packages/bundle/src/config.ts", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "Example configuration"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JavaScript"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "const widgetConfiguration = findify.config.getIn(['features', 'search', '#home-findify-rec-2']);findify.widget.attach('#node', 'search', widgetConfiguration.toJS())", "code": true}]}], "lang": "dart"}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Widgets"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "findify.widgets", "code": true}, {"text": " - contains methods to manage widgets"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "findify.widgets.attach([node], [type], [config])", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Will create a custom widget and render it in HTML node."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "node", "italic": true}, {"text": " - CSS selector or DOM node where the widget will be placed"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "type", "italic": true}, {"text": " - The type of a widget (could be \"Autocomplete\", \"Search\", \"Recommendation\")"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "config", "italic": true}, {"text": " - Extends the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://github.com/findify/findify-js/blob/develop/packages/bundle/src/config.ts#L75", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "feature configuration"}]}, {"text": ". Also, you can provide a \"widgetKey\" to be able to access this widget by a key."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "findify.widgets.detach([widgetKey])", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Will completely remove a widget."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "widgetKey", "italic": true}, {"text": " - unique widget key or specified one"}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "findify.widgets.list()", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "List of created widgets on the page."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "findify.widgets.get([widgetKey])", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Returns a widget by key."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children":
